name: Lung Cancer Synoptic Report
description: Synoptic pathology report template for lung cancer

findings.technique: Lobectomy / wedge resection / segmentectomy / pneumonectomy specimen submitted for pathological examination. Specimen inked and serially sectioned.
findings.comparison: Clinical history: [lung mass / lung cancer staging]. Pre-operative imaging: [CT/PET showing mass in X lobe]. Prior biopsy: [positive/negative] for malignancy.

sections.name: Specimen Type
sections.content: Specimen type: [Lobectomy / Segmentectomy / Wedge resection / Pneumonectomy] [right/left], [upper/middle/lower] lobe.

sections.name: Histologic Type
sections.content: Histologic type: [Adenocarcinoma / Squamous cell carcinoma / Small cell carcinoma / Large cell carcinoma / Carcinoid tumor / Other]. Subtype: [lepidic / acinar / papillary / solid / micropapillary for adenocarcinoma].

sections.name: Tumor Size
sections.content: Tumor size: [X]cm (greatest dimension). [Tumor location: X lobe, X segment]. [Pleural involvement: visceral pleura / parietal pleura / chest wall].

sections.name: Grade
sections.content: Histologic grade: [Well / Moderately / Poorly] differentiated. [Associated with lepidic pattern / Scar-forming / other patterns].

sections.name: Stromal Invasion
sections.content: Stromal invasion: [present/absent]. [Invasive size: X cm]. [Pattern: acinar / papillary / solid / micropapillary]. [STAS: present/absent].

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Lymph nodes: [Station X] examined, [X] positive for metastasis. [Total nodes: X]. [Hilar / Mediastinal] nodes. [Extranodal extension: present/absent].

sections.name: Margins
sections.content: Bronchial margin: [uninvolved / involved]. Vascular margin: [uninvolved / involved]. Parenchymal margin: [uninvolved / involved].

sections.name: Molecular Testing
sections.content: EGFR mutation: [mutated / wild-type / not performed]. ALK rearrangement: [positive / negative / not performed]. PD-L1 TPS: [X]%.

impression:
1. [Histologic type], [subtype], [grade], measuring [X]cm
2. [pT stage] with [pleural invasion: present/absent]. [STAS: present/absent]
3. Lymph nodes: [X] positive out of [X] examined
4. Margins: [status]
5. Molecular: [EGFR: X, ALK: X, PD-L1: X%]
6. [AJCC 8th edition stage: pT[X] pN[X] M[X]]
author: RadReport Templates
